'''samupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibmeister|nibmeister]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibmeister|nibmeister]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| samupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæmipith|sæmipith]] || [[word:sæmipij|sæmipij]] || [[word:sæmipish|sæmipish]] || [[word:sæmipi|sæmipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:samumuputh|samumuputh]] || [[word:samumupuj|samumupuj]] || [[word:samumupush|samumupush]] || [[word:samumupu|samumupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:samuputh|samuputh]] || [[word:samupuj|samupuj]] || [[word:samupush|samupush]] || [[word:samupu|samupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:samufputh|samufputh]] || [[word:samufpuj|samufpuj]] || [[word:samufpush|samufpush]] || [[word:samufpuf|samufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:samuputhu|samuputhu]] || [[word:samupuju|samupuju]] || [[word:samupushu|samupushu]] || [[word:samupuku|samupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:samuputh|samuputh]] || [[word:samupuj|samupuj]] || [[word:samupush|samupush]] || [[word:samupu|samupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:samuputhul|samuputhul]] || [[word:samupujul|samupujul]] || [[word:samupushul|samupushul]] || [[word:samupukul|samupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:samuputhuthu|samuputhuthu]] || [[word:samupujuju|samupujuju]] || [[word:samupushushu|samupushushu]] || [[word:samupuku|samupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:samuputhun|samuputhun]] || [[word:samupujun|samupujun]] || [[word:samupushun|samupushun]] || [[word:samupukun|samupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:samuputhuoro|samuputhuoro]] || [[word:samupujuoro|samupujuoro]] || [[word:samupushuoro|samupushuoro]] || [[word:samupukuoro|samupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
